2022-23 Tulane Green Wave Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 20-11 (12-6, 3rd in AAC MBB)

Coach: Ron Hunter

PS/G: 79.9 (19th of 363)

PA/G: 77.2 (341st of 363)

SRS: 5.46 (98th of 363)

SOS: 2.69 (105th of 363)

ORtg: 106.3 (130th of 363)

DRtg: 102.6 (202nd of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
